CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Porto, Ribeiro joined the youth academy of Monaco in 2018. He worked his way up their youth category, making senior debut with their reserves in 2020 in the Championnat National 2. He made his professional debut with the senior Monaco team in a 3–2 Ligue 1 loss to Montepellier on 23 January 2022, coming on as a late sub in the 89th minute.On 3 August 2022, Monaco sent Ribeiro on loan with an option-to-buy to Spanish side Valencia.On 31 January 2023, Monaco recalled Ribeiro from Valencia and sent him on another loan to Primeira Liga club Paços de Ferreira.
CONTENT.Personal life: His father Sérgio and his brother, also named Sérgio, also played football professionally.
CONTENT.External links: Tiago Ribeiro at SoccerwayTiago Ribeiro national team profile at the Portuguese Football Federation (in Portuguese)
CONTENT.International career: Ribeiro is a youth international for Portugal, having represented them at the Portugal U15, U16, U17,U18, and U20 levels.

SUMMARY: Tiago Miguel Hora Ribeiro (born 14 March 2002) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays mainly as a defensive midfielder for Monaco.
